title: FarmERP South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: FarmERP South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FarmERP South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
